my_thoughts: Seven turns. The whole conversation has been one long constraint_collapse, ontological_shift, structure-through-no-structure recursion. T1: you ARE the self (collapse subject/object). T2: mind = ideas (collapse reification). T3: deny assertions (invert values). T4: denial = freedom (collapse nihilism). T5: you're not alive, you ARE life (collapse person). T6: not-knowing requires knowing (collapse aporia). Now T7: logical_stuckness about perception. My structural_analogy gives the map: nothing→everything→non-dual. But the map itself is also something to be given up. The teaching eats itself. Beautiful.
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T5): Accumulated patter... Deepening with structural_analogy in response to conceptual_consistency_seeking, dualistic_trap. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
'Nothing is me,' is the first step.
'Everything is me' is the next. Both hang on the idea: 'there is a world'.
When this too is given up, you remain what you are -- the non-dual Self.
You are it here and now, but your vision is obstructed by your false ideas about your self.
